006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.client;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.util.*;
023
024/**
025 * A transport-layer HTTP response.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Produced by {@link HttpTransport#execute(TransportRequest)} and consumed by the higher-level
029 * {@code RestResponse}.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Callers <b>must</b> close this object (it implements {@link Closeable}) after consuming the response body;
033 * transport implementations use the close callback to release connection-pool resources.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * <b>Beta — API subject to change.</b>
037 *
038 * @since 9.2.1
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "resource" // body and closeCallback are owned by TransportResponse and released in close()
042})
043public final class TransportResponse implements Closeable {
044
045   private final int statusCode;
046   private final String reasonPhrase;
047   private final List<TransportHeader> headers;
048   private final InputStream body;
049   private final Closeable closeCallback;
050
051   private TransportResponse(Builder builder) {
052      this.statusCode = builder.statusCode;
053      this.reasonPhrase = builder.reasonPhrase;
054      this.headers = List.copyOf(builder.headers);
055      this.body = builder.body;
056      this.closeCallback = builder.closeCallback != null ? builder.closeCallback : () -> {};
057   }
058
059   /** Returns a new {@link Builder}. */
060   public static Builder builder() {
061      return new Builder();
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Returns the HTTP status code.
066    *
067    * @return The status code (e.g. {@code 200}).
068    */
069   public int getStatusCode() {
070      return statusCode;
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Returns the reason phrase (e.g. {@code "OK"}), or {@code null} if absent.
075    *
076    * @return The reason phrase, possibly <jk>null</jk>.
077    */
078   public String getReasonPhrase() {
079      return reasonPhrase;
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Returns all response headers.
084    *
085    * @return An unmodifiable list. Never <jk>null</jk>.
086    */
087   public List<TransportHeader> getHeaders() {
088      return headers;
089   }
090
091   /**
092    * Returns the first header with the given name (case-insensitive), or {@code null} if absent.
093    *
094    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
095    * @return The first matching header, or <jk>null</jk>.
096    */
097   public TransportHeader getFirstHeader(String name) {
098      return headers.stream()
099         .filter(h -> eqic(h.name(), name))
100         .findFirst()
101         .orElse(null);
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Returns the response body stream, or {@code null} if the response has no body.
106    *
107    * <p>
108    * Callers must not close this stream directly — close the {@link TransportResponse} instead.
109    *
110    * @return The body stream, possibly <jk>null</jk>.
111    */
112   public InputStream getBody() {
113      return body;
114   }
115
116   @Override /* Closeable */
117   public void close() throws IOException {
118      closeCallback.close();
119   }
120
121   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
122   // Builder
123   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
124
125   /**
126    * Fluent builder for {@link TransportResponse}.
127    *
128    * <p>
129    * Primarily used by transport implementations and tests.
130    *
131    * @since 9.2.1
132    */
133   @SuppressWarnings({
134      "resource" // body and closeCallback are passed into TransportResponse which owns and closes them
135   })
136   public static final class Builder {
137
138      int statusCode;
139      String reasonPhrase;
140      final List<TransportHeader> headers = new ArrayList<>();
141      InputStream body;
142      Closeable closeCallback;
143
144      private Builder() {}
145
146      /**
147       * Sets the HTTP status code.
148       *
149       * @param value The status code.
150       * @return This object.
151       */
152      public Builder statusCode(int value) {
153         statusCode = value;
154         return this;
155      }
156
157      /**
158       * Sets the reason phrase.
159       *
160       * @param value The reason phrase. May be <jk>null</jk>.
161       * @return This object.
162       */
163      public Builder reasonPhrase(String value) {
164         reasonPhrase = value;
165         return this;
166      }
167
168      /**
169       * Appends a response header.
170       *
171       * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
172       * @param value The header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
173       * @return This object.
174       */
175      public Builder header(String name, String value) {
176         headers.add(TransportHeader.of(name, value));
177         return this;
178      }
179
180      /**
181       * Sets the response body stream.
182       *
183       * @param value The stream. May be <jk>null</jk>.
184       * @return This object.
185       */
186      public Builder body(InputStream value) {
187         body = value;
188         return this;
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Sets a callback invoked when {@link TransportResponse#close()} is called.
193       *
194       * <p>
195       * Transport implementations use this to return connections to the pool.
196       *
197       * @param value The close callback. May be <jk>null</jk>.
198       * @return This object.
199       */
200      public Builder closeCallback(Closeable value) {
201         closeCallback = value;
202         return this;
203      }
204
205      /**
206       * Builds and returns the {@link TransportResponse}.
207       *
208       * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
209       */
210      public TransportResponse build() {
211         return new TransportResponse(this);
212      }
213   }
214}
